column1: text
Your parcel booked under your Aadhaar number contains illegal items. Pay a fine of Rs 9500 immediately or you will face arrest.
This is regarding a courier seized at Mumbai customs under your name containing banned substances. Pay the penalty now to avoid legal action.
A parcel with your ID proof has been intercepted by customs and found to contain illegal narcotics. Cooperate immediately or a warrant will be issued.
Your FedEx shipment has been flagged for illegal goods. To avoid arrest, clear the customs fine within 30 minutes.
We are calling from the courier company. Your package contains prohibited items and is linked to your Aadhaar card. Pay the clearance fee to avoid police action.
Sir your parcel is stuck at the airport, customs found illegal documents inside, you need to pay processing charges today itself or case will be filed.
Your courier has been detained by customs officials, five passports and drugs were found inside using your name, deposit the fine to release it.
This is an automated call from customs department, a parcel under your number contains illegal items, press 1 to speak to an officer immediately.
Your shipment is linked to money laundering activity, customs has flagged your Aadhaar, pay the settlement amount now to avoid arrest warrant.
Hello maam, I am calling from the crime branch regarding a pending case linked to your bank account. Please join a video call for identity verification.
There is a pending case registered under your name, we need to verify your identity over video call before proceeding further.
Your number has come up in an ongoing investigation, kindly join the video verification call so we can clear this matter today.
This is a courtesy call to inform you that your Aadhaar is linked to a case under investigation, please switch on your camera for verification.
Sir I am from the verification department, there is a pending matter against you, we need you to join a video call and stay online until it is resolved.
Your identity needs to be verified for an ongoing legal matter, please do not disconnect and join the video call immediately.
We have received a complaint against your number, kindly join the verification call and do not inform anyone until the process is complete.
There is a case file open under your PAN card, please join the video verification and remain available for further instructions.
This call is regarding a pending legal notice against you, for verification purposes please join the video call right now.
Your bank account is under scrutiny due to a linked case, please cooperate and join the video verification session to avoid further action.
Maam this is a sensitive matter, a case has been registered in your name, join the video call so our officer can verify your details personally.
Please do not switch off your phone, your identity verification for a pending case is in progress, stay on this video call until instructed.
An FIR has been filed with your details in a financial fraud case, join the video call now so the officer can explain further and verify you are not involved.
